docket_entries.docketEntryComment: /CAL APPT OF CONFLICT COUNSEL & TO SET/X DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT TODAY, DEFNDANT IN STATE PRISON/X COURT APPOINTS CHERYL WALLACE AS CONFLICTS COUNSE/CTORD:THE REMITTITUR FILED 04-21-17 AT COURT OF APPEAL BE FILED IN COURTTODAY/X:COURT SPREAD THE REMITTITUR ON THE MINUTES AS FOLLOWS:THE JUDGMENTAS TOTHE FIRST DEGREE MURDER CONVICTION IS VACATED, AND THE MATTER IS REMANDED TO THE SUPERIOR COURT WITH THE DIRECTIONS TO ALLOW THE PEOPLE TO ACCEPT A REDUCTION OF THE CONVICTION TO SECOND DEGREE MURDER OR TO RETRY THE GREATER OFFENSE,/X:FOLLOWING THE PEOPLE'S ELECTION AND AT THE CONCLUSION OF FURTHER PROCEEDINGS, THE SUPERIOR COURT IS DIRECTED TO AMEND THE ABSTRACT OFJUDGMENT ACCORDINGLY AND TO SEND A CERTIFIED COPY OF THE AMENDED ABSTRACT TO THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION,/CONTD:SETTING FURTHER PROCEEDINGS/
